description: Replace arecord with pw-record + fix dual daemon race condition via flock

userStories.title: Replace arecord with pw-record in start_recording()
E2E test: verify no startup clipping with pw-record
Add flock-based singleton enforcement to daemon
userStories.description: As a user, I want only one daemon to run at a time, even if daemon start is triggered from multiple sources concurrently.
acceptanceCriteria: ASRDaemon.run() acquires fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB) on daemon.lock before writing PID file
If lock acquisition fails, daemon prints message and exits immediately
Lock is held for the lifetime of the daemon (fd stays open), auto-released on crash/exit
is_daemon_running() also probes the lock file as a secondary check (try LOCK_EX|LOCK_NB: if fails, daemon is alive)
No stale lock files: flock auto-releases when process dies
All three start paths covered: start_daemon_with_model(), toggle_recording(), _switch_model()

userStories.title: Unit test for singleton daemon enforcement
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a test proving two daemons cannot run simultaneously.
acceptanceCriteria: Test acquires flock on daemon.lock, then verifies ASRDaemon.run() exits immediately
Test verifies is_daemon_running() returns True when lock is held
